concerns: SSRF risk on x-openai-base-url header — mitigated by restricting to passthrough mode only (client_key mode ignores the header)
Upstream maintainers dropped OpenAI support in v3.0 — recommend probing with #563+#564 before full cascade
Credential validation via GET /v1/models may not work for all OpenAI-compatible providers — fallback: warn and allow
Usage telemetry normalization (#569) must happen at ingest in the pipeline processor, not in storage layer
Session detection asymmetry: Anthropic uses metadata.user_id body extraction; OpenAI uses x-session-id header only — this is intentional (OpenAI clients don't embed session IDs in request body)
